ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock exchange was established */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., equity, derivative, forex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data provider */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider supplying the dataset */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the dataset belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dataset (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dataset */,
  "data_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the dataset */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends per share */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, data scientist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the dataset */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_markets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market assigned to the dataset */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the market was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_exchanges" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange assigned to the dataset */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock exchange was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_providers" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider assigned to the dataset */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the data provider was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_news" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article assigned to the dataset */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sentiment record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the sentiment belongs to */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "sentiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)
